'''Relal Tawron''' was the [[High Priest/Legends|High Priest]] and leader of the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]] of [[Tafanda Bay]] as of [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], having succeeded [[Momaw Nadon/Legends|Momaw Nadon]]. He gave the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Imperial Remnant]] permission to enter the forbidden area of [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor's]] surface to prepare defenses against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Just before the [[Battle of Ithor]] he was among the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]] to be evacuated to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}
